title: Suraksha V1 Indian Scam Decision Tree

doors.title: I Lost Money
doors.subtitle: UPI, investment, job, loan app, bank, shopping, relationship scams.
doors.question: How did the money issue happen?

options.label: I paid someone and got blocked
I scanned QR to receive money
Job / Work-from-home / Visa
options.question: What did they ask money for?

doors.title: Someone Is Threatening Me
doors.subtitle: Digital arrest, sextortion, blackmail, harassment, stalking.
doors.question: What kind of threat?

doors.title: Police / Cyber / Bank Problem
doors.subtitle: Reporting, FIR, bank reversal, portal delays, consumer routes.
doors.question: Where are you stuck?

doors.title: Work, Home, Family, Other
doors.subtitle: Non-scam legal problems that will still enter Suraksha.
doors.question: What kind of issue?

upi_paid_blocked.title: UPI paid and got blocked
upi_paid_blocked.explanation: User voluntarily paid through UPI after deception. Speed matters for freezing downstream accounts.

qr_receive_scam.title: QR code receive-money scam
qr_receive_scam.explanation: User scanned QR and entered UPI PIN thinking they were receiving money. PIN generally authorizes sending money.

otp_pin_scam.title: OTP / UPI PIN / card detail scam
otp_pin_scam.explanation: User shared OTP/PIN/card details or approved a payment request.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

remote_access_scam.title: Remote access app bank drain
remote_access_scam.explanation: Scammer used AnyDesk/TeamViewer/QuickSupport/screen sharing to control or view the device.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

fake_customer_care.title: Fake customer care number scam
fake_customer_care.explanation: User called a fake customer-care number found online and was guided into payment or data sharing.

unauthorised_transaction.title: Unauthorised bank/card/UPI transaction
unauthorised_transaction.explanation: Money moved without clear authorization. Bank reporting timeline is critical.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

telegram_investment.title: Telegram/WhatsApp investment scam
telegram_investment.explanation: Fake groups, profit screenshots, advisors, and withdrawal traps are used for repeated deposits.

crypto_scam.title: Crypto/fake exchange scam
crypto_scam.explanation: User was routed to a fake exchange/wallet or asked to send crypto/INR for fake returns.
actions: Report platform if real exchange involved

fake_regulated_investment.title: Fake SEBI/RBI regulated investment scheme
fake_regulated_investment.explanation: Scammers show fake regulator documents/certificates to create trust.

task_investment.title: Task investment recharge scam
task_investment.explanation: Small returns are shown first, then user is asked to recharge/pay more to unlock withdrawals.

job_fee_scam.title: Fake job registration/training fee scam
job_fee_scam.explanation: Fake recruiter asks for registration, training, HR, certificate, or processing fee.

task_job_scam.title: Task job / likes / reviews scam
task_job_scam.explanation: Work-from-home task scam pays small amounts then asks deposits to continue or withdraw.

visa_job_scam.title: Overseas job / visa scam
visa_job_scam.explanation: Fake agents collect money for visa, ticket, processing, medical, permit, or embassy work.

equipment_deposit_job.title: Fake equipment/security deposit job scam
equipment_deposit_job.explanation: Recruiter asks refundable laptop/equipment/security deposit before onboarding.

loan_app_harassment.title: Loan app harassment after borrowing
loan_app_harassment.explanation: Predatory loan app harasses despite repayment, uses contacts and threats.

loan_app_contacts.title: Loan app contacting family/contacts
loan_app_contacts.explanation: App scraped contacts and is using social shame to extort.

loan_app_morphed.title: Loan app morphed image extortion
loan_app_morphed.explanation: Morphed obscene/defamatory images are used to extract money.

fake_loan_extortion.title: Fake loan demand without borrowing
fake_loan_extortion.explanation: Scammers claim fake dues or loan records and threaten user.
actions: Ask for agreement once then stop

kyc_scam.title: Fake KYC/account block scam
kyc_scam.explanation: Scammer claims KYC expired/account will block and pushes link/OTP/remote app.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

credit_card_reward.title: Credit card reward/limit scam
credit_card_reward.explanation: Reward points, limit upgrade, fee reversal, or closure bait used to capture OTP/card data.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

sim_trai_scam.title: TRAI/SIM misuse threat
sim_trai_scam.explanation: Caller claims SIM/Aadhaar used in crime and pressures for verification/payment.
actions: Do not join fake police call

account_lien.title: Bank account frozen / cyber lien
account_lien.explanation: Account may be frozen because disputed funds entered it or linked cyber complaint exists.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

atm_misuse.title: ATM/debit card misuse
atm_misuse.explanation: Card credentials or ATM access may be compromised.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

instagram_shop.title: Instagram/social shopping scam
instagram_shop.explanation: Fake seller takes payment, blocks user, sends wrong product, or disappears.

marketplace_scam.title: OLX/Facebook Marketplace scam
marketplace_scam.explanation: QR receive scam, fake army buyer, courier deposit, advance seller fraud.
actions: Do not scan QR to receive

courier_customs.title: Courier/customs parcel scam
courier_customs.explanation: Scammer says parcel has drugs/passports/cash/customs issue and demands money or transfers to fake police.
actions: Do not stay on video call

ecommerce_refund.title: E-commerce refund/replacement fraud
ecommerce_refund.explanation: Fake support agent or refund link tricks user into UPI/card/bank compromise.
actions: Do not enter UPI PIN to receive refund
File cyber complaint if money lost

matrimonial_scam.title: Matrimonial profile money scam
matrimonial_scam.explanation: Fake marriage prospect builds trust and asks money for emergency/travel/customs/investment.

romance_scam.title: Romance/dating app money scam
romance_scam.explanation: Relationship trust used for money, gifts, travel funds, medical help, or emergencies.
actions: Do not share more private material

honey_trap.title: Honey trap scam
honey_trap.explanation: Victim is lured into compromising interaction and then threatened for money/reputation.
actions: Tell one trusted person if safety risk

digital_arrest.title: Digital arrest / fake police video call
digital_arrest.explanation: Fraudsters impersonate police/CBI/ED/Narcotics/TRAI and claim user is under digital arrest. Authorities do not arrest by video call.
actions: Call local police/112 if physically threatened

fake_parcel_threat.title: Fake parcel crime threat
fake_parcel_threat.explanation: Caller claims parcel in user's name contains drugs/passports/cash and uses fear to extract money.

identity_misuse_threat.title: Aadhaar/SIM/bank identity misuse threat
identity_misuse_threat.explanation: Scammer says identity is used in crime and pressures for money/data.
actions: Do not share OTP/Aadhaar on call

fake_police_payment.title: Fake police fine/security deposit demand
fake_police_payment.explanation: Demand to transfer money to avoid arrest during call/video call is a scam signal.

sextortion_real.title: Sextortion with real intimate content
sextortion_real.explanation: Threat to leak intimate content unless user pays or complies.
actions: If minor involved seek urgent police help

sextortion_morphed.title: Sextortion with morphed/fake content
sextortion_morphed.explanation: Fake/morphed obscene content is used for blackmail.

sextortion_contact_threat.title: Threat to send content to contacts
sextortion_contact_threat.explanation: Threatening contacts is an extortion tactic. Paying often leads to repeated demands.
actions: Warn trusted contacts briefly if needed

sextortion_shared.title: Private/morphed content already shared
sextortion_shared.explanation: Immediate focus is evidence, takedown, reporting, and safety support.

private_info_blackmail.title: Private information blackmail
private_info_blackmail.explanation: Someone threatens to expose private information unless user pays or obeys.

business_extortion.title: Business/reputation extortion
business_extortion.explanation: Threat involves reviews, defamatory posts, client exposure, or business disruption unless paid.

false_case_threat.title: False case / false allegation threat
false_case_threat.explanation: Threat of false complaint/public accusation used to extort money/control behavior.

repeat_extortion.title: Repeated extortion demands
repeat_extortion.explanation: Repeated demands often continue after payment. Priority is reporting and safety.

whatsapp_harassment.title: Phone/WhatsApp harassment
whatsapp_harassment.explanation: Repeated calls/messages may be harassment, stalking, intimidation, or extortion.

social_harassment.title: Social media harassment/impersonation
social_harassment.explanation: Abusive DMs, impersonation, threats, obscene messages, or public defamation online.

offline_stalking.title: Offline stalking/following
offline_stalking.explanation: Repeated following/unwanted visits can escalate. Safety comes before documentation.

known_person_threat.title: Known person/ex threatening
known_person_threat.explanation: Threats from known people may involve stalking, blackmail, domestic violence, or extortion.
actions: File police complaint if threats continue
Consult lawyer if false cases involved

cyber_report_needed.title: Need to report online fraud
cyber_report_needed.explanation: User needs guided cybercrime report and bank freeze process.

1930_issue.title: 1930 not reachable / not answered
1930_issue.explanation: If helpline fails, file online and contact bank immediately in parallel.
actions: Visit cyber police if high amount
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

portal_delay.title: Cyber portal complaint delay
portal_delay.explanation: User needs follow-up and escalation record after filing.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

bank_needs_cyber.title: Bank asking for cyber complaint
bank_needs_cyber.explanation: Bank may require cyber acknowledgement to process freeze/dispute.
actions: Escalate to nodal officer if delayed
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

fir_refused.title: Police refused FIR/complaint
fir_refused.explanation: Written escalation and senior officer route may be needed.
actions: Consult lawyer for magistrate route if serious

civil_matter_pushback.title: Police says it is civil matter
civil_matter_pushback.explanation: Some disputes are civil, but deception/threats may still justify criminal complaint depending on facts.

threat_police_inaction.title: Threat case but police not acting
threat_police_inaction.explanation: Safety-first escalation is needed where threats/stalking/extortion exist.

bank_reversal.title: Bank freeze/reversal request after fraud
bank_reversal.explanation: Bank needs quick fraud intimation with transaction IDs and cyber acknowledgement.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

bank_rejected.title: Bank rejected fraud complaint
bank_rejected.explanation: User may need written rejection, nodal escalation, and RBI Ombudsman route.
authorities: RBI Ombudsman route if bank fails after complaint

consumer_refund.title: E-commerce/seller refund problem
consumer_refund.explanation: May be consumer complaint unless seller was fake/fraudulent.
actions: Use cyber route for fake seller

telecom_issue.title: Telecom/SIM complaint issue
telecom_issue.explanation: SIM misuse/SIM swap/telecom grievance may require telecom and cyber escalation.
actions: File cyber complaint if financial loss

travel_booking_scam.title: Travel booking/refund scam
travel_booking_scam.explanation: Can be consumer dispute or scam depending on fake agency/payment deception.
actions: File cyber complaint if fake agency vanished

course_scam.title: Course/coaching/education scam
course_scam.explanation: False placement/refund promises may be consumer issue; fake institute may be fraud.

salary_not_paid.title: Salary not paid
salary_not_paid.explanation: Employer has delayed/withheld wages/salary. Route depends on employee vs contractor.

freelance_unpaid.title: Freelance/client not paying
freelance_unpaid.explanation: Usually contract/recovery unless deception from start.

deposit_not_returned.title: Security deposit not returned
deposit_not_returned.explanation: Landlord withholding deposit after move-out needs agreement, handover proof and written demand.

illegal_eviction.title: Illegal eviction/threat by landlord
illegal_eviction.explanation: Threats, lockout, forced eviction need urgent record and possible police/legal help.
actions: Do not leave under threat without record

rental_listing.title: Rental listing/broker scam
rental_listing.explanation: Fake flat/broker collects token/visit/booking amount and vanishes.
actions: File cyber complaint if paid online

domestic_violence.title: Domestic violence
domestic_violence.explanation: Safety-first issue. Legal routes include police, protection support, shelter/helpline and court protection.
actions: Move to safe place if possible

family_relationship_threat.title: Family threatening adult relationship
family_relationship_threat.explanation: Adults need safety planning if family threatens violence, confinement, or forced marriage.
actions: Move to safe place if immediate risk
Call police/112 if confined or attacked
